title: What Makes the Blue Lagoon So Special?

scenes.text: This geothermal spa features striking azure waters surrounded by lava fields.
This is the Blue Lagoon, located in Grindavik, Iceland.
The minerals in the water are known for their skin healing properties.
The stunning contrast of blue against black rocks is breathtaking.
scenes.label: STUNNING CONTRAST

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Blue Lagoon, Grindavik - Iceland. A stunning geothermal spa known for its vibrant blue waters and healing properties. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
